title: EzCraftables
description: EZ Craftables adds balanced crafting recipes for rare items like Elytra, Trident, Totem, Enchanted Apple, Name Tag, and Horse Armor.
body:
# **EZ Craftables ✨**

Tired of searching endless biomes or grinding mobs just to get a single rare item?
**EZ Craftables** fixes that by adding **simple, fair, and fully balanced crafting recipes** for items that normally take hours to obtain.

Craft powerful and hard-to-find gear like the **Elytra 🪽**, **Trident 🔱**, **Totem of Undying 🟡**, **Enchanted Golden Apple 🍏**, **Name Tag 🏷️**, and all **Horse Armors 🛡️** all without breaking the natural progression of the game.

Every recipe is designed to feel rewarding yet reasonable, making it perfect for:

* Survival worlds 🌍
* SMPs with friends 🤝
* Builders who want items faster 🧱
* Players who hate grind but love progression ⚔️

Upgrade your world with convenience, balance, and smoother gameplay, **all in one lightweight datapack**.
